title: Set of 4 Stacking Mugs Coffee Tea Cups Aztec Black Cream Grey New Bone China Large
features: SIZE: Single mug height: 9cm. Diameter: 10cm. Capacity: 520ml/17.5oz. Material: New Bone China (THIS IS DIFFERENT FROM FINE BONE CHINA).
WHAT'S INCLUDED: This set includes 4 stackable mugs in 4 assorted designs.
ELEGANT AZTEC PATTERN: The mugs feature beautiful black (2 x black design) and grey (2 x grey design) Aztec pattern on a contrasting cream background.
PERFECT FOR TEA & COFFEE: Ideal for coffee, tea and other hot beverages on chilly nights. These mugs look beautiful whether on their own or stacked one on top of each other.

STACKING DESIGN: Stacking mugs are versatile. This set of four allows you to save space in the cupboard and their pretty design will add an elegant touch to your home decor. This decorative set is a perfect housewarming gift for loved ones.
